mlx5_0 port 1 ==> ibs3 (Up)
mlx5_1 port 1 ==> ibs2 (Up)
mlx5_2 port 1 ==> ibp3s0 (Up)
mlx5_3 port 1 ==> ibp36s0 (Up)
mlx5_4 port 1 ==> bond0 (Up)
mlx5_5 port 1 ==> ibp227s0 (Up)
mlx5_6 port 1 ==> ibp196s0 (Up)
mlx5_7 port 1 ==> bond0 (Up)
mlx5_8 port 1 ==> ibp131s0 (Up)
mlx5_9 port 1 ==> ibp164s0 (Up)
